description: You are a backend engineer at a SaaS company. Fix five critical bugs in the Node.js real-time document collaboration server located at /home/ga/workspace/collab_server/. Customers have reported memory exhaustion, ping timeouts (event loop blocks), data overwriting on concurrent saves, process crashes on invalid tokens, and freezing on specific chat mentions. Use 'npm run test:load' to reproduce the issues and verify the fixes.
